27 Apr 2017

Testing out micro.blog integration with my blog at micro.endonend.org

25 Apr 2017

This AM I backed Jimmy Wales’ WikiTribune project – a news platform that combines traditional journalism with the Wikipedia model.

We want to make sure that you read fact-based articles that have a real impact in both local and global events. And that stories can be easily verified and improved.

The best part is it will be 100% ad free (supported by contributions like mine) and no paywall. Meaning no click-bait or low value news – just real, evidence-based news for the masses.

By donating to our campaign, you’ll play a critical part in an energetic surge towards media honesty. It’s a movement that we believe will eventually obliterate low-rent, unreliable news for good. We want to raise enough money up front to get us started – but we need your regular commitment to make sure we can keep improving and delivering on giving you real news.

Check the campaign video: https://vimeo.com/214586867

Then head over and make a contribution: https://www.wikitribune.com

29 Mar 2017

In reply to: …</p>Pure brilliance from DeVos today… picking a school should be like choosing between Uber, Lyft, or a taxi. Or different types of milk. Yup.

I guess this would be true if the taxi was free and paid for by public money, of which some went to Uber and Lyft to provide similar (but not necessarily better) services – all while having no regulations or standards to meet, choosing where they operate, AND being able to make a profit.

DeVos is SO qualified. eyeroll

Source: DeVos: Picking a school should be like choosing among Uber, Lyft or a taxi - The Washington Post

28 Mar 2017
On this day 20 years ago, I went on a first date with this little lady to see the Descendents. Never could have predicted the adventures, happiness and love we've experienced so far (and yet to come)! I couldn't have picked a better person to share it all with... love you @mdettbarn! via Instagram [ift.tt/2nK2kyC](http://ift.tt/2nK2kyC)
